data.title: HKEX Posts Record Q1 2026 Results as Trading and Connect Volumes Hit New Highs
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hong Kong Exchanges & Clearing ( (HK:0388) ) has provided an announcement.

Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing reported record revenue and profit for the first quarter of 2026, driven by heightened global demand for safe-haven assets and access to Asian growth. Hong Kong retained its status as a leading global IPO venue, supported by a strong pipeline of innovative and growth-sector listings.

Secondary market turnover surged, with 20 trading days above HK$300 billion and a new quarterly high in Northbound Stock Connect activity, underscoring robust participation from both Mainland Chinese and international investors. Beyond equities, record volumes at the London Metal Exchange and OTC Clear, along with resilient data and connectivity businesses, highlighted the strength of HKEX’s diversified multi-asset platform.

The group advanced key strategic initiatives, including the next phase of minimum spread reductions, a consultation on enhancing the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s listing framework and new stock options and indices to broaden its product ecosystem. New collaborations with Brazil’s B3 and Bursa Malaysia on carbon and commodities markets, plus initiatives such as HKEX Foundation’s Care for Caregivers Programme, reinforced its regional connectivity and stakeholder engagement ambitions.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0388) stock is a Buy with a HK$545.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hong Kong Exchanges & Clearing stock, see the HK:0388 Stock Forecast page.

More about Hong Kong Exchanges & Clearing

Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited operates Hong Kong’s stock and derivatives markets, providing multi-asset trading, clearing and market data services. Through platforms such as Stock Connect, OTC Clear and the London Metal Exchange, it connects international and Chinese Mainland investors and issuers, with a growing focus on commodities, indices and cross-border connectivity.

Average Trading Volume: 4,856,394

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$520.9B

data.title: OKEA Delivers Strong First Quarter and Confirms 2026–27 Guidance
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

OKEA ASA ( (DE:3SX) ) has provided an update.

OKEA reported a strong first quarter of 2026, with operating income rising to USD 239 million and EBITDA to USD 129 million on the back of higher production and realised prices. Net profit reached USD 36 million, reversing a loss in the previous quarter, while net production increased to 34.9 kboepd, driven by a new Brage well and high production efficiency.

Revenues from petroleum sales more than doubled as lifted volumes and market prices improved, although unrealised hedging losses weighed on other operating income. The company strengthened its balance sheet by agreeing to sell its 20% stake in the Mistral discovery for USD 30 million, and it kept production and capex guidance for 2026 and 2027 unchanged, signalling operational stability amid volatile global energy markets.

More about OKEA ASA

OKEA ASA is a Norwegian oil and gas company focused on mid- and late-life assets on the Norwegian continental shelf. Listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange, the company pursues value creation and growth by acquiring and efficiently operating mature fields, emphasising capital discipline and optimising production from existing resources.

Average Trading Volume: 777,399

Current Market Cap: NOK4.07B

data.description:

Papyrus Australia Ltd ( (AU:PPY) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Papyrus Australia Ltd has issued 17,500,000 fully paid ordinary shares without a prospectus under the Corporations Act, in line with prior ASX announcements and an Appendix 2A lodged on the same day. The company has confirmed its ongoing compliance with financial reporting and continuous disclosure obligations and stated that there is no undisclosed price-sensitive information, aiming to reassure investors about transparency around the new share issuance.

The notice, lodged under section 708A(5)(e) of the Corporations Act, formalises that the new shares were issued on 29 April 2026 and qualify for on-sale without additional disclosure. By affirming that no excluded information exists and that all statutory reporting requirements have been met, Papyrus reinforces its adherence to regulatory standards, which is significant for maintaining market confidence in the expanded capital base.

More about Papyrus Australia Ltd

Papyrus Australia Ltd is an ASX-listed company operating in the industrial and manufacturing sector. It issues fully paid ordinary shares to support its capital and compliance needs as part of its activities on the Australian securities market.

Ragnar Metals Limited ( (AU:RAG) ) has provided an update.

Ragnar Metals reported its quarterly cash flow for the period ended 31 March 2026, highlighting modest customer receipts and continued spending on exploration and evaluation activities. The company also incurred typical corporate and staff costs while earning small interest income, resulting in a marginal net cash inflow from operating activities for the quarter.

Investing cash flows were positive, driven by proceeds from the disposal of investments that more than offset exploration spending, while financing inflows came mainly from the exercise of options. Overall, Ragnar’s cash balance increased substantially over the quarter to A$840,000, indicating improved liquidity that may support ongoing exploration programs and corporate commitments.

data.title: Geely’s Q1 Revenue Climbs and Core Profit Surges Despite FX Hit
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Geely Automobile Holdings ( (HK:0175) ) has provided an announcement.

Geely Automobile Holdings reported first-quarter 2026 sales of 709,358 vehicles, up 1% year-on-year, with revenue rising 15% to RMB83.78 billion on strong export growth and a higher mix of high-value products. While reported profit attributable to shareholders fell 27% to RMB4.17 billion due to adverse foreign exchange effects, core profit rose 31% to RMB4.56 billion, highlighting improved operating efficiency and profitability and suggesting resilient underlying performance despite currency volatility.

Total assets declined 5% from year-end 2025 to RMB276.79 billion, while equity attributable to shareholders grew 3% to RMB95.29 billion, indicating a stronger capital base even as the balance sheet slightly contracted. The divergence between headline and core earnings underscores management’s emphasis on underlying operations, with the results likely to reassure stakeholders that the company is gaining margin traction through product mix upgrades and exports despite macro and FX headwinds.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0175) stock is a Buy with a HK$22.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Geely Automobile Holdings stock, see the HK:0175 Stock Forecast page.

More about Geely Automobile Holdings

Geely Automobile Holdings Limited is a Chinese automotive manufacturer focused on passenger vehicles, including higher-value models aimed at both domestic and export markets. Listed in Hong Kong with dual currency counters, the group positions itself as a volume player while moving up the value chain through exports and premium product offerings.

Average Trading Volume: 80,535,562

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$249.7B

data.title: Lundin Mining Streamlines Portfolio and Sharpens Copper Focus in 2025
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Lundin Mining ( (TSE:LUN) ) has issued an announcement.

Lundin Mining’s latest management discussion and analysis for 2025 outlines a streamlined portfolio after divesting several non‑core assets, with operations now concentrated in Latin America and the Vicuña development project in Argentina. The company completed the sale of its Neves‑Corvo and Zinkgruvan mines in Europe in April 2025 and agreed in December 2025 to sell the Eagle mine and Humboldt mill in the U.S., whose results are now treated as discontinued operations and classified as held for sale at year‑end, signaling a sharpened strategic focus on its core copper growth platform.

The report details that Lundin Mining continues to present all operations on a 100% basis except for the Vicuña joint operation, where it consolidates its 50% share of assets, liabilities, expenses and cash flows. By consolidating Vicuña and shedding mature assets, the company is positioning itself more squarely as a copper‑centric player aligned with global megatrends, which may have implications for its production mix, capital allocation priorities and risk profile for investors and other stakeholders.

More about Lundin Mining

Lundin Mining is a Canadian base metals producer headquartered in Vancouver, operating three mines in Chile and Brazil and holding a 50% interest in the Vicuña copper development project in Argentina. The company focuses on copper and other essential metals that underpin long‑term demand trends such as urbanization, electrification, digitalization and advanced technologies.

For a thorough assessment of LUN stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: American Uranium Launches Rights Issue to Advance Lo Herma Uranium Project
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from GTI Resources Ltd ( (AU:AMU) ).

American Uranium Ltd has launched a non-renounceable rights issue to raise up to approximately $2.58 million before costs through the offer of up to 21,552,877 new shares to eligible shareholders in Australia, New Zealand, and Canada. Shareholders on the 28 April 2026 record date can subscribe for one new share for every six held at $0.12 per share, with a 1-for-2 free attaching option exercisable at $0.16 expiring in June 2029, and all new shares will rank equally with existing stock.

The capital raised will fund resource expansion, infill and expansion drilling, and hydrogeological and metallurgical studies at the Lo Herma ISR Uranium Project, as well as landholding, offer costs, and working capital. The entitlement offer is positioned as a key step in advancing Lo Herma toward a planned Q3 2026 scoping study, signalling continued progression of the company’s flagship uranium project and potential value creation for participating shareholders.

More about GTI Resources Ltd

American Uranium Ltd is an ASX-listed uranium exploration and development company focused on in-situ recovery (ISR) uranium projects. Its primary asset is the Lo Herma ISR Uranium Project, where the company is undertaking resource expansion, infill drilling, and technical studies to advance the project toward economic evaluation.

data.title: ASQ moves into kaolin with White Swan deal and capital raise
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Australian Silica Quartz Group ( (AU:ASQ) ) has shared an announcement.

Australian Silica Quartz Group has agreed to acquire private explorer Australian Kaolin Pty Ltd for $2 million in shares, adding the White Swan Kaolin Project and its inferred 47 million tonne kaolin resource on a newly granted mining lease near the Port of Esperance. The deal, which is subject to shareholder approval and a favourable independent expert report, would also bring experienced director Jamie Cullen onto the ASQ board and retain kaolin specialist James Marsh as a consultant.

ASQ is simultaneously progressing metallurgical-grade silicon quartz exploration near Townsville, high-purity quartz R&D for crucible-grade products, and gold exploration at its Koolyanobbing Metals Project, where soil sampling results are due in the June quarter. The company ended March with $945,000 in cash, no debt and a rural property valued at $2.5 million, and has raised a further $750,000 via a share placement, strengthening its balance sheet to support development of the White Swan DSO kaolin export strategy and broader project pipeline.

More about Australian Silica Quartz Group

Australian Silica Quartz Group is an Australian exploration company focused on silica, high purity quartz, kaolin and associated industrial minerals. The group is advancing projects in Western Australia and North Queensland, targeting supply into export markets for metallurgical-grade silicon, crucible-grade high purity quartz and direct shipping ore kaolin, alongside gold exploration at its Koolyanobbing Metals Project.

Average Trading Volume: 150,186

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Hatten Land Reports No Material Changes Under Judicial Management
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hatten Land Limited ( (SG:PH0) ) just unveiled an update.

Hatten Land Limited, now under judicial management, remains focused on stabilising its operations and complying with Singapore Exchange Catalist rules while its shares stay suspended. The company, together with its subsidiaries, continues to navigate restructuring and regulatory oversight as it works through its current financial and operational challenges.

In its latest monthly update, the judicial managers reported no material changes in the group’s affairs since the previous update, aside from matters already disclosed in earlier announcements. The company said it will continue to provide periodic updates on any significant developments and urged shareholders and investors to review all disclosures carefully and seek professional advice when dealing in its suspended shares.

More about Hatten Land Limited

Hatten Land Limited, incorporated in Singapore and currently under judicial management, operates as an investment holding company with property development interests in Malaysia. The group’s activities have been affected by ongoing restructuring efforts, and its shares have been suspended from trading on the Singapore Exchange’s Catalist board since August 2024.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: S$20.43M

data.title: Altech Wins €46m German Grant as It Refocuses Battery Operations in Germany
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Altech Chemicals Limited ( (AU:ATC) ) is now available.

Altech Chemicals has secured conditional binding approval for up to €46.11 million in German government funding under the federal STARK program to support its CERENERGY sodium-chloride solid-state battery project in Saxony, covering about 30% of eligible project capital costs and materially de-risking funding for a planned 120 MWh manufacturing facility. The company is consolidating its Silumina Anodes R&D laboratory from Perth to Germany to sit alongside its pilot plant, has appointed a Germany-based chief technology officer, and surrendered a non-core Kerrigan exploration licence to cut costs, while continuing to seek partners to achieve full financial close by 30 June 2026 for the grant to be activated.

More about Altech Chemicals Limited

Altech Chemicals Limited, through its subsidiary Altech Batteries GmbH, is advancing battery technologies with a focus on CERENERGY sodium-chloride solid-state batteries and Silumina Anodes battery materials. The company targets the European stationary energy storage market, operating key facilities and R&D activities in Saxony, Germany.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell
